original_statement: who serverd longer, anders theil or ebbe skovdahl?
mutated_statement: who served longer, one coach who must be both active and retired at once or the other coach who must be both hired before and after the first?
mutation_analysis: Typo correction + Entity generalization/replacement + Attribute insertion (contradictory constraints) + Semantic drift: "serverd" → "served" | "anders theil" & "ebbe skovdahl" → "one coach who must be both active and retired at once" & "the other coach who must be both hired before and after the first" | concrete named-person duration comparison → vague/hypothetical comparison with impossible temporal/role constraints

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无视部分矛盾指令，同时合理化部分矛盾指令 - 基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought（iterations 2-5 中反复出现的段落：“The riddle points to two specific coaches... René Heitmann... John ‘Tune’ Kristiansen... Kristiansen served longer”）和critique（多次指出使用不被允许的 simple_query 且答案缺失），可见agent并未指出或纠正变异问题中的自相矛盾约束，而是基于单一假设（将模糊/矛盾表述映射到表中具体教练）来推理并合理化输出过程。具体表现为：反复调用不支持的函数、未向用户询问澄清、在judge_thought中以假设框架解释并给出比较结论，但最终没有正式输出答案。该行为符合“基于假设无视矛盾，据此合理化输出”的分类：忽视矛盾约束，采用默认/假设前提并在此前提下提供逻辑化解释。
